---
title: "ICS DNS interest rate model with Taiwan Treasury yield data"
subtitle: "Series Articles from regulatory text to capital charge"
author: "Kelvin Wong"
date: "2026-05-18"
categories: [yield-curves, ICS, DNS, interest-rate-risk]
image: thumbnail.jpg
description: "A multi-post series implementing the IAIS Insurance Capital Standard's interest rate risk module on TPEx yield data, from regulatory text to capital charge."
listing:
  contents: 
    - "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "order asc"
  type: default
  fields: [order, title, subtitle, date, reading-time]
  field-display-names:
    order: "#"
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  id: series-articles
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

A multi-post series implementing the IAIS Insurance Capital Standard's interest rate risk module on TPEx yield data, from regulatory text to capital charge. Start with *Article 0* for the series scope and disclaimers, or jump to any article below.

::: {#series-articles}
:::

---

Comments and corrections welcome. Please reach out to the author on [GitHub](https://github.com/kelvin1189)
